cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.text: We use our own and third-party cookies for the proper functioning of the website, to show advertising and to analyse its use. You can accept all, choose only the essential ones or reject them.

about.heroSubtitle: Gather your friends, family or colleagues and turn your favourite songs into a unique gaming experience.
about.projectP1: MusiBingo is a real-time musical bingo web platform. A host creates a game by choosing a playlist; players join with a code, each one receives a different card and must mark the songs as 30-second snippets play.
about.projectP2: The first to complete a line or the whole card wins. Simple, exciting and perfect for any occasion: birthdays, farewell parties, game nights or just a good time.
about.f1Desc: More than 15 pre-built playlists across multiple genres and decades, or create your own with the songs you want.
about.f2Desc: Share a 6-letter code and play with your friends from any device, instantly.
about.f3Desc: Each player gets a different card generated automatically, printable as a PDF.
about.f4Desc: Songs play directly in the browser thanks to the Deezer API — no external player needed.
about.h1Desc: The host picks a pre-built playlist or creates a custom one with their favourite songs.
about.h2Desc: Share the game code. Players join by scanning the QR or entering the 6-letter code.
about.h3Desc: The music plays, you mark the songs on your card, and the first to complete it wins.
about.moiraDesc1: MoiraOrdo is a creative development organisation committed to building unique, functional and characterful web experiences. We are passionate about technology in service of people, and we love giving each of our projects its own identity.
about.moiraDesc2: MusiBingo was born out of the idea of bringing music, gaming and technology together in a product that people genuinely want to use. We hope you enjoy it as much as we enjoyed building it. 🎵
about.ctaSubtitle: Create a game in seconds and challenge your friends.

donate.label: 💶 Support the project
donate.title: Why am I asking for your support?
donate.p1: Maintaining platforms like MusiBingo and developing new titles requires much more than time. There are server costs, domains, development tools and hours of coffee (lots of coffee!).
donate.p2: So far I have funded everything out of my own pocket, but to carry out the new developments I have in mind, I need a small push from the community.
donate.destinationTitle: What will the donations be used for?
donate.destinationLeadin: Your contribution, however small, will go directly towards:
donate.d1Desc: Improving MusiBingo with new game modes requested by you.
donate.d2Desc: Developing two new prototypes of free games that I already have in the works.
donate.d3Desc: Making sure the websites keep running smoothly even when everyone wants to play at once.
donate.d4Desc: Being able to dedicate more quality time to developing content for the community.
donate.ctaTitle: It's not just a donation, it's an investment in fun
donate.ctaP1: If you've ever played a round of MusiBingo or you like the MoiraOrdo philosophy, this is the best way to say "thank you!".
donate.ctaP2: There's no obligation, but if you can chip in the price of a soft drink or a pizza, you'll be helping me keep creating games that anyone, anywhere in the world, can enjoy for free.
donate.thanks: Thank you for being part of this journey and for supporting independent development!
